zh.lifeSummary: 當Albreda de Harcourt於大約1115年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾申頓時，她的父親Ivo d'Harcourt17歲，母親Rohese Peveral12歲。她與William Trussebut在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾爾姆斯利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1205年之前在英國英格蘭越可爾瓦特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Albreda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Elfreda  , but now probably taken as a feminine equivalent of   Alfred .

en.lifeSummary: When Albreda de Harcourt was born about 1115, in Shenton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ivo d'Harcourt, was 17 and her mother, Rohese Peveral, was 12. She married William Trussebut in Helmsley, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 1205, in Warter, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albreda de Harcourt est née environ 1115, à Shenton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ivo d'Harcourt, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Rohese Peveral, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé William Trussebut à Helmsley, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1205, à Warter, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Warter, Yorkshire East Riding, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 워터
ko.lifeSummary: Albreda de Harcourt(이)가 대략 1115년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 셰턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ivo d'Harcourt(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese Peveral(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 헬슬리에서 William Trussebut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1205년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 워터에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William Trussebut em Helmsley, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Warter, Yorkshire East Riding, England: вартир, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albreda de Harcourt родилась около 1115 г. в местности шентон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ivo d'Harcourt было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese Peveral, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Trussebut в местности хелмсли, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 1205 г. в местности вартир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
